positive: Minimalist geometric celestial body cluster: a perfect circle sun setting behind a trio of crescent moons and nebula cloud wisps, rendered with thick, clean black lines on a solid deep indigo background. Emphasize high contrast and stylized, interlocking shapes. The style should be sophisticated retro-futurism, combining the clean simplicity of mid-century modern graphic design with the depth of celestial art. Composition must be centered and balanced, forming a strong, repeatable silhouette. Include subtle gold foil accents only on the edge of the crescent moons. Vector art, printable t-shirt design, high contrast, kawaii aesthetic, 8k, flat lay, seamless repeat potential.
negative: blur, noisy, grainy, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, signature, extra limbs, bad anatomy, smudge, dirty background, low quality, amateur, fuzzy, gradient, photorealistic
